summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Addrika e-commerce order management features. All 8 requested features have been implemented and tested successfully via both API tests (9/9 passed) and UI automation.

1_date_formatting.details: Admin orders tab shows proper date format: '12 Feb 2026, 01:38 pm IST'

2_total_payment_columns.details: Total column shows '₹10260.00', Payment column shows status (Pending) and mode (Online)

3_customer_order_history.details: AccountPage.jsx has expandable order details with Items Ordered, Price Summary, Payment Details, Shipping Information sections

4_email_on_status_change.details: admin.py calls send_order_status_update_v2() in background task when status changes

5_landmark_field_registration.details: Registration page has 'Nearby Landmark (Optional)' field after Street Address with proper placeholder

6_rto_status_option.details: RTO status option visible in admin orders dropdown and API accepts 'rto' as valid status

7_shipping_modal.details: Modal appears when changing to 'Shipped' status with Carrier Name and Tracking Number fields

8_rto_voucher_policy.details: Checkout page has RTO policy notice before Pay Now button, API generates voucher on RTO status with 15% charge deducted

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 order management features are implemented and working. Admin orders tab shows correct date/total/payment formatting. Shipping modal appears on 'Shipped' status change. RTO voucher auto-generates on RTO status. Registration includes landmark field. Checkout has RTO policy notice.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - This was a feature implementation verification, not bug fixing
